final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] cell_data;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            cell_data <= data_in; // Store data in cell_data
        end
        data_out <= cell_data; // Output stored data
    end
endmodule
